_meta.name: status-badge-creatio
_meta.description_es: Componente StatusBadge estilo Creatio. Variantes: active (verde), inactive (rojo), pending (naranja). Usa CSS custom properties para tematización. Incluye data-testid para tests E2E.
_meta.description_en: Creatio-style StatusBadge component. Variants: active (green), inactive (red), pending (orange). Uses CSS custom properties for theming. Includes data-testid for E2E tests.

usage_es:
<StatusBadge label='Activo' active />
<StatusBadge label='Inactivo' active={false} />
<StatusBadge label='Pendiente' variant='pending' />

Variant 'auto' resuelve según prop active (boolean).
usage_en:
<StatusBadge label='Active' active />
<StatusBadge label='Inactive' active={false} />
<StatusBadge label='Pending' variant='pending' />

Variant 'auto' resolves from active boolean prop.
